cover.title: Dutch for 40 degrees
cover.sub: What everyone is saying while the country melts

cards.note: The word every Dutch person says in a heatwave.

examples.nl: Morgen wordt het een tropische dag.
examples.en: Tomorrow will be a tropical day.

cards.note: The official Dutch weather word for 30+.

cards.meaning: a "tropical night" that stays above 20 degrees

cards.note: A fun way to say it's way too hot.

cards.meaning: nice weather, eh? (said at ANY temperature)
cards.note: A Dutch person will say this while melting.

cta.title: Save these for the next hot day
cta.sub: Send it to whoever keeps saying it's snikheet.
